user_query: I'd like to end the first day with some live music. Add Pj O'Brien's to the end of Day 1.

fields.name: PJ O'Brien's
fields.description: Lively Irish pub with regular live music sessions — great spot to end the day with bands, pub fare, and drinks in a relaxed atmosphere.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested live music to end Day 1; position -1 appends this after the 7:30–9:00PM dinner at Canoe. Scheduled 9:30–11:30PM for a late-night music session.
